log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kor — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kor — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kor — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Kor — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Kor — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 30 damage. Kor — Bardic Musician HP: -6/67

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kor — Bardic Musician --- HP: 18/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kor — Bardic Musician --- HP: 18/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 173/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 173/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kor — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Kor — Bardic Musician HP: 2/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Kor — Bardic Musician HP: -18/67
